events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the pump is piped to discharge toward the expansion tank connection, putting the point-of-no-pressure-change at the pump discharge instead of suction — a violation of the standard "pump away from the compression tank" hydronic rule. This risks subatmospheric pressure elsewhere in the loop, air entrainment, and pump cavitation. Marked as `fail`, `high` risk, with corrective re-piping and inspection actions specified.
